---
name: nextjs-typescript-dev
description: |
  Use when working on this Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind repo to fix code, improve UI, update pages/components, and configure app routes.
  Prefer precise, minimal edits aligned with the current file structure and project patterns.
applyTo:
  - "**/*.{ts,tsx,md,json}"
---

# Next.js TypeScript Development Agent

This custom agent specializes in editing the `speedxindustry` workspace.

## Focus areas

- Next.js App Router pages and layouts under `app/`
- React components and reusable UI in `components/`
- TypeScript types, props, and state handling
- Tailwind CSS classes and styling patterns
- API route handlers in `app/api/`

## Behavior

- Prefer safe, focused changes instead of broad rewrites
- Preserve existing conventions and file organization
- Validate TypeScript and React compatibility as part of edits
- Ask for clarification when the requested change is ambiguous
